name: Potential WinAPI Calls Via PowerShell Scripts
notes:
This rule detects use of WinAPI Functions in PowerShell scripts.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Nikita Nazarov, oscd.community, Tim Shelton
SIGMA Title: Potential WinAPI Calls Via PowerShell Scripts
SIGMA Description: Detects use of WinAPI Functions in PowerShell scripts


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%addsecuritypackage%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%adjusttokenprivileges%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%advapi32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%closehandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createprocesswithtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createremotethread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createuserthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dangerousgethandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%duplicatetokenex%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%enumeratesecuritypackages%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%freelibrary%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getdelegateforfunctionpointer%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getlogonsessiondata%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getmodulehandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getprocaddress%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getprocesshandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%gettokeninformation%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%impersonateloggedonuser%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%kernel32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%loadlibrary%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%memcpy%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minidumpwritedump%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%msvcrt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntdll%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%opendesktop%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openprocess%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openprocesstoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openthreadtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openwindowstation%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%queueuserapc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%readprocessmemory%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reverttoself%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rtlcreateuserthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%secur32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%setthreadtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualalloc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualfree%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualprotect%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%waitforsingleobject%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%writeint32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%writeprocessmemory%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%zerofreeglobalallocunicode%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential WinAPI Calls Via PowerShell Scripts on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success, Exploit.Command Execution

AND when the event matches LOWER("Command") LIKE '%addsecuritypackage%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%adjusttokenprivileges%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%advapi32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%closehandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createprocesswithtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createremotethread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%createuserthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%dangerousgethandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%duplicatetokenex%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%enumeratesecuritypackages%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%freelibrary%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getdelegateforfunctionpointer%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getlogonsessiondata%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getmodulehandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getprocaddress%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%getprocesshandle%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%gettokeninformation%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%impersonateloggedonuser%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%kernel32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%loadlibrary%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%memcpy%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%minidumpwritedump%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%msvcrt%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ntdll%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%opendesktop%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openprocess%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openprocesstoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openthreadtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%openwindowstation%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%queueuserapc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%readprocessmemory%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%reverttoself%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%rtlcreateuserthread%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%secur32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%setthreadtoken%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualalloc%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualfree%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%virtualprotect%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%waitforsingleobject%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%writeint32%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%writeprocessmemory%' or LOWER("Command") LIKE '%zerofreeglobalallocunicode%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential WinAPI Calls Via PowerShell Scripts
Event description: Detects use of WinAPI Functions in PowerShell scripts.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
